hero.subtitle: VIVAZ CLAY TARGETS
hero.title: EUROPEAN LEADERS IN ECOLOGICAL CLAY TARGETS
hero.description: Over 50 years of manufacturing and pioneers since 2001 in natural resins.

whyVivaz.subtitle: WHY VIVAZ
whyVivaz.title: MAXIMUM PERFORMANCE WITH MINIMUM ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT
whyVivaz.qualityDesc: Consistent targets: stable flight, predictable trajectories and reliable breakage.
whyVivaz.sustainabilityDesc: Natural resins and cleaner production, ready for the 2026 European regulation.
whyVivaz.performanceDesc: More visibility, better impact reading and a precise, satisfying shooting experience.

natura.title: NATURA. THE PREMIUM CLAY TARGET
natura.description: Made entirely with natural pine resin, with 0 mg/kg PAH content. Developed to deliver maximum performance in ISSF disciplines and for shooters who demand the highest precision in every shot.

ecostar.title: ECO STAR. EFFICIENT PERFORMANCE
ecostar.description: ECO STAR is designed to deliver superior resistance and flawless performance in long and demanding launches.

commitment.title: THE VIVAZ COMMITMENT
commitment.description: Sustainability is the foundation of our innovation and the core of our environmental leadership. VIVAZ leads the industry by offering products that minimize environmental impact, backed by decades of experience.

ctaSection.subtitle: VIVAZ CLAY TARGETS
ctaSection.title: CHOOSE THE ECOLOGICAL CLAY TARGET THAT GIVES YOU THE EDGE
ctaSection.description: NATURA and ECO STAR offer stable flight, high visibility and clean, consistent breakage, with more responsible materials. Tell us your discipline and type of use, and we'll guide you to the best option.

contact.title: Contact
contact.talkDesc: Tell us your project, discipline or type of use. We'll guide you to the best solution for your needs.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Message sent successfully. We will contact you soon.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

regulation.title: European Regulation 2026
regulation.subtitle: EU Regulation 2025/660
regulation.timelineVivazDesc: First pine resin clay targets in Europe
regulation.pahRestrictionDesc: Clay targets containing petroleum-based PAH above regulated limits will be prohibited across all EU member states.
regulation.vivazReadyDesc: VIVAZ products have been compliant since 2001. Our Natura range uses 100% pine resin with 0 mg/kg PAH content.
regulation.marketImpactDesc: Clubs, federations, and distributors must transition to compliant products before the enforcement date.
regulation.ctaDesc: Ensure your club or federation is prepared with VIVAZ eco-friendly clay targets.

technology.title: Technology & Sustainability
technology.subtitle: Ecological innovation
technology.pineResinDesc: Since 2001, we have used natural pine resin as the base for our targets. A renewable resource that completely replaces petroleum derivatives, eliminating the presence of PAH (Polycyclic Aromatic Hydrocarbons) in our premium products.
technology.processDesc: Our process combines over 50 years of tradition with cutting-edge technology. Each target undergoes quality controls ensuring uniformity in weight, hardness and flight behaviour.
technology.environmentDesc: Vivaz targets biodegrade naturally without contaminating soil or water. We comply with REACH regulation and are prepared for EU regulation 2025/660 entering into force in April 2026.
technology.petroleumItems: Contain carcinogenic PAH|Contaminate soil and water|Non-biodegradable|Non-compliant with 2026 regulation
technology.vivazItems: 0 mg/kg PAH (Natura)|Naturally biodegradable|Renewable pine resin|Ready for EU 2026
technology.reachDesc: All our products comply with the EU REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006, which governs the manufacture and use of chemical substances.

about.title: About Vivaz
about.subtitle: Since 1967
about.historyDesc: Founded in 1967, Jesús y Vicente Vázquez S.L. has been synonymous with excellence in clay target manufacturing for over five decades. From our factory in Spain, we supply shooters, clubs and federations worldwide.
about.pioneerDesc: In 2001, we became the first manufacturer in Europe to develop targets with natural pine resin, anticipating the European regulation by more than two decades. This vision has positioned us as undisputed leaders in ecological targets.
about.factoryDesc: Our production plant combines state-of-the-art machinery with the artisanal knowledge accumulated over generations. Each target undergoes rigorous quality controls before leaving the factory.

metadata.title: VIVAZ Clay Targets — European Leaders in Ecological Clay Targets
metadata.description: Ecological clay target manufacturers since 1967. Natura range (0% PAH, 100% pine resin) and Eco Star. Ready for EU 2026 regulation.
